extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is at least one sharp upward spike followed by a quick drop (local maximum above ~0.7 followed by a fall of at least ~0.3).  
R2: In the middle region (about 20–60% of the series), the signal oscillates around a moderate level (~0.4–0.6) without staying near the minimum for long.  
R3: In the last 20% of the series, the values stay in a medium band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without a deep valley close to 0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 15–20% of the series, the signal starts high (around or above 0.6–0.7) and then steadily decreases toward a low value (~0.1–0.2).  
R2: In the middle region (about 20–60% of the series), the signal remains mostly moderate (~0.3–0.6) with no very high early spike.  
R3: Near the last third of the series, there is a pronounced deep valley (value near 0) followed by a clear recovery to moderate or high values (~0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15 time steps, there is a sharp rise to a pronounced early peak (around 0.8–1.0) followed by a quick drop back below about 0.4.  
R2: Around the middle of the series (time steps ~20–40), the signal stays in a moderate band, oscillating roughly between 0.3 and 0.6 without hitting very low values (~0.1) or very high values (~0.9).  
R3: Later in the series (after time step ~40), there are one or two deep dips close to the minimum (around 0.1–0.2), followed by a recovery to moderate or high values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: At the very beginning (first ~5 time steps), the series starts already high (around 0.6–0.8) and immediately begins a sustained downward trend.  
R2: In the early-to-middle part (time steps ~5–25), the signal moves from high to low, reaching a clear low valley (around 0.1–0.2) before recovering.  
R3: In the late part (after time step ~35), there is a tall, narrow peak to high values (around 0.7–0.8) followed by a long, steep drop from high to very low levels, then only a partial recovery to moderate values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is at least one sharp positive peak (local maximum) that clearly stands above its immediate neighbors, followed by a rapid drop.  
R2: After this early peak-and-drop, the series spends most of the middle portion (roughly 20–70% of the length) oscillating around a mid-level (about half of the full amplitude), without remaining very low for a long continuous stretch.  
R3: In the last 20–30% of the series, values stay in a mid-to-high range (no pronounced deep valley near the end).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high and then shows an early, relatively smooth decline into a pronounced low valley within the first 20–25% of the length (a clear downward “slope” rather than a sharp spike).  
R2: The middle portion (about 25–70% of the length) is dominated by one long, broad “hill” or plateau: values rise from that early valley and stay mostly elevated before falling again, rather than showing frequent mid-level oscillations.  
R3: Near the end (last 15–25% of the series), there is a noticeable recovery from a low point: after a deep dip, the values climb back up toward the mid range rather than staying low or trending downward.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Contains a very sharp, high peak (≥ ~0.8) within the first 15% of the series, followed quickly by a deep drop (≤ ~0.25).  
R2: After the early peak–drop, the mid-section (from ~20% to ~60% of the series) stays mostly in a medium band, oscillating between ~0.3 and ~0.6 without long flat parts.  
R3: Ends without an extended low segment: the last 20% of the series remains mostly above ~0.3 and shows at least one visible rise.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts high (first 5–10% of the series above ~0.6) and then steadily falls into a clear low valley (≤ ~0.25) within the first 25% of the series.  
R2: Has a pronounced central peak: between ~30% and ~60% of the series the values rise above ~0.7 and then fall again.  
R3: After the central peak, there is another clear low segment (≤ ~0.25) around 60–80% of the series, followed by a moderate recovery that ends in a mid range (~0.35–0.55).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Has at least one sharp, tall peak (value ≥ 0.8) occurring in the first half of the series.  
R2: After the tall peak, there is a deep drop where the value falls below 0.2.  
R3: The end part of the series (last quarter) stays in a mid-level band, roughly between 0.3 and 0.6, without any extreme spikes.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts relatively high (around 0.6–0.7) and then steadily decreases to a clear low valley (≤ 0.2) within the first quarter of the series.  
R2: In the middle section, values mostly remain in a mid-range plateau (about 0.4–0.6) with only moderate fluctuations, without very sharp peaks.  
R3: Contains a single dominant tall peak (around ≥ 0.7) in the middle-to-late part of the series, followed by a pronounced drop toward a low value (< 0.2).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part (first ~10% of time), the series tends to rise quickly and often reaches a relatively high local peak (around 0.7–1.0) followed by a sharp drop.  
R2: In the middle part (about 20–60% of time), the series exhibits several medium-height oscillations (roughly between 0.3 and 0.6) without long flat segments.  
R3: In the late part (last ~20% of time), the series either stays roughly in the mid-range (0.3–0.6) or ends with a moderate peak, without a sustained deep valley near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part (first ~10–15% of time), the series starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and then steadily drops down to a clear local minimum (around 0.1–0.3).  
R2: In the middle part (about 20–60% of time), the series recovers from that early minimum and forms a broad mid-level plateau or hill (mostly 0.4–0.6) with relatively smooth variations.  
R3: In the late part (last ~20% of time), the series again includes a pronounced downward excursion (a deep valley below ~0.2) before ending with a recovery to mid values (around 0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15 time steps, there is at least one sharp *up* spike above 0.8 that is immediately followed by a rapid drop of at least 0.4.
R2: Around the middle (time steps 20–40), the series stays mostly in a moderate band between 0.3 and 0.6 without extreme highs or lows.
R3: In the last 20 time steps, there are at least two pronounced peaks above 0.6 separated by clear valleys below 0.3.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 15 time steps, the series shows a strong *downward* motion: it starts high (above 0.6) and drops to near 0.2 or below without an early spike above 0.8.
R2: Around the middle (time steps 20–40), the series forms a broad hump: values rise from low (~0.2) to mid–high (around 0.6–0.75) and then fall again, with no very deep valley (<0.1).
R3: In the last 20 time steps, the series becomes smoother, staying mostly between 0.3 and 0.6 with only one minor dip below 0.2 and without multiple sharp high peaks.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part of the series (first ~10–15% of time), there is a pronounced spike upward followed by a sharp drop (local max > 0.6 then local min < 0.3).
R2: In the middle part of the series, values fluctuate around a mid‑level (roughly 0.4–0.6) without staying low for long.
R3: In the later part (last ~20–30% of time), there is at least one deep valley (below ~0.2) followed by a strong rebound peak (above ~0.6).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part of the series (first ~10–15% of time), there is a strong downward trend from a relatively high value (~0.6–0.7) to a low value (~0.2 or below).
R2: In the middle part of the series, values remain mostly in a medium band (~0.35–0.55) without very sharp peaks or valleys.
R3: In the later part (last ~20–30% of time), there is a single pronounced drop from mid/high values (~0.5–0.7) to near the minimum of the series (~0.1), followed by a moderate recovery that does not return to the early high level.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part of the series (indices ~0–10), there is a pronounced upward spike that quickly drops to a clear local minimum, forming a sharp peak-and-fall pattern.  
R2: In the late part of the series (indices ~45–70), there are two or more relatively sharp peaks separated by noticeable dips, giving a “wavy” high-variation ending segment.  
R3: Across the whole series, the amplitude varies strongly, with multiple deep drops below about 0.2 interspersed with peaks above about 0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part of the series (indices ~0–10), the signal starts high and then steadily or smoothly decreases to a low value, without an early sharp upward spike.  
R2: In the middle of the series (indices ~15–40), the signal remains in a moderate band (roughly 0.3–0.6) with comparatively smoother, less extreme oscillations.  
R3: In the late part of the series (indices ~40–60), there is typically one dominant sharp valley (a rapid drop to near the minimum) followed by a smoother recovery, rather than multiple alternating sharp peaks and valleys.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the series shows a clear upward spike followed by a sharp drop (peak above about 0.7 then falls below about 0.3).  
R2: After time step 15 and up to about time step 40, the series stays mostly between 0.3 and 0.6, without touching very low values (e.g., not going below 0.2 for more than a brief point).  
R3: In the last 20 time steps, the series shows at least one local minimum below about 0.2 followed by a recovery to around 0.5–0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 15 time steps, the series starts high (around or above 0.6–0.7) and then steadily declines to a low valley near or below 0.2, without a strong rebound in that region.  
R2: Between about time steps 15 and 40, the series stays in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without very sharp peaks or very deep dips.  
R3: Shortly after time step 40 (roughly 40–55), there is a pronounced sharp drop from around 0.6–0.7 down to near 0.1–0.2, forming a deep, narrow valley before partially recovering.
